title: Episode 14 data transfer experiment
wikitext:
[]: Episode 14 data transfer experiment             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Dec 23, 2012 4:43 pm The berserker incident in episode 14 that occurred during Shinji's initial run in Unit-00 was the byproduct of an experiment to see if pilot data could be transferred between Evangelion units. It seemed like a perfectly legitimate experiment at the time. There's a slight problem, though: NERV can already do this. In episode one, after Shinji refuses to pilot the EVA, Ritsuko orders that Unit-01's systems be reconfigured for Rei. If NERV is already capable of data exchange between Evangelions, then what is the purpose of the second experiment?

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Sun Dec 23, 2012 4:51 pm My guess is that they only determined that the process was possible in the specific case of "Rei + Unit-01". The second test might have been to determine if the pilots and Evas are interchangeable in a general sense rather than in specific cases.

[]:             Quote Post by cyharding » Sun Dec 23, 2012 4:52 pm I may be wrong, but it was to see if the dummy plugs would work in the Evas. If you remember from the battle with Bardiel when the dummy plug is activated on Unit 01, we could see the physical system placed behind Shinji and it says on the side of it that it's based on Rei's data. One could assume that in Unit 00, there's a dummy plug installed using Shinji's data.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Dec 23, 2012 4:53 pm cyharding wrote: If you remember from the battle with Bardiel when the dummy plug is activated on Unit 01, we could see the physical system placed behind Shinji and it says on the side of it that it's based on Rei's data. One could assume that in Unit 00, there's a dummy plug installed using Shinji's data.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Sun Dec 23, 2012 4:55 pm cyharding wrote: I may be wrong, but it was to see if the dummy plugs would work in the Evas. If you remember from the battle with Bardiel when the dummy plug is activated on Unit 01, we could see the physical system placed behind Shinji and it says on the side of it that it's based on Rei's data. One could assume that in Unit 00, there's a dummy plug installed using Shinji's data.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Dec 23, 2012 4:56 pm So then, we still haven't gotten anywhere with the real purpose of the experiment.

[]:             Quote Post by cyharding » Sun Dec 23, 2012 4:59 pm I believe that the OP was relating to NGE's continuity not Rebuild unless I'm completely mistaken on what IIRC means.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Dec 23, 2012 5:16 pm Likewise, Shinji co-pilots with Asuka in her Unit-02 during her debut episode, each of them even break their personal best synch records! However, this is probably a outlier case. Given that Rei herself is basically a dummy to house a soul in, as Ritsuko explains in 23, she likely has potential in cross-Eva piloting. Her connection with Yui and Lilith also probably gives her an added bonus. How I might interpret it: Rei is the first Dummy Plug (or Doll, if you prefer). However, the Chamber of Guf was empty, and no new souls could be produced, so we're left to work with is that one soul that embodies Rei and any of her spare bodies. So Gendo and Ritsuko performed experiments on her (like the ones where he see her all nudez in the in the tube) in order to produce the data for the artificial Dummy Plug that we later become familiar with. Kaworu had also apparently done the same for the Eva Series. It should be noted that Asuka was excluded from the experiment. Should we trust that this was simply because Ritsuko truly considered Asuka's feelings about others piloting her Eva? Or could it be because the scene is just meant to give us more nods to the Yui/Lilith/Rei paradigm?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 23, 2012 5:28 pm I should note that although the pilot interchange experiment involves 00/Shinji and 01/Rei, they end up putting dummy systems in Eva-01 and Eva-02 .

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Dec 23, 2012 7:08 pm Reichu wrote: I should note that although the pilot interchange experiment involves 00/Shinji and 01/Rei, they end up putting dummy systems in Eva-01 and Eva-02 .

[]:             Quote Post by Lavinius » Sun Dec 23, 2012 8:18 pm Rei can pilot any Eva for the same reason Kaworu can- they are Angels, Fruit Incarnate. That's presumably also why Kaworu and Rei's data was used for the Dummy plugs. Sachi, I would imagine the (tongue-in-cheek) reason Shinji and Asuka work so well together against Gaghiel is that Evae are powered with Psychosexualism.

[]:             Quote Post by Darkwing » Sun Dec 23, 2012 9:33 pm Unit-01 is a little bit of the odd one out in a way. Yui is the only one where we know the soul willingly went into the Eva in order to be able to control it. I imagine that as long as she's willing anyone who can pilot an Eva can work with her. But if she doesn't want them to, they can't. Kaworu said he can sync with any Eva derived from Adam. You'd think Rei could do the same with the lilith derived Unit-01, but if I recall correctly Yui rejected her during Zueriel's attack.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Sun Dec 23, 2012 10:20 pm Kendrix wrote: (It's also sorta cute how he feels EVA 00 needs to remore control because he trusts Rei never to do anything that might warrant the use on one)

[]:             Quote Post by Darkwing » Sun Dec 23, 2012 11:02 pm Chuckman wrote: Maybe it simply wouldn't work, and trying to synch Unit 0 with the Dummy Plug, which is Rei, while Rei is in the regularly plug, would cause some sort of feedback.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Dec 24, 2012 12:09 am Darkwing wrote: Was it ever confermed that it was some part of Rei in Unit-00, or is that still just Fannon?

[]:             Quote Post by jimmiel » Mon Dec 24, 2012 12:31 am Darkwing wrote: Unit-01 is a little bit of the odd one out in a way. Yui is the only one where we know the soul willingly went into the Eva in order to be able to control it. I imagine that as long as she's willing anyone who can pilot an Eva can work with her. But if she doesn't want them to, they can't. Kaworu said he can sync with any Eva derived from Adam. You'd think Rei could do the same with the lilith derived Unit-01, but if I recall correctly Yui rejected her during Zueriel's attack.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Mon Dec 24, 2012 2:22 am Darkwing wrote: Was it ever confermed that it was some part of Rei in Unit-00, or is that still just Fannon?

[]:             Quote Post by A.T. Fish » Mon Dec 24, 2012 5:52 am But the dummy plug is supposed to be used by itself, without a pilot, and it only synchronizes with the Eva upon activation.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Dec 24, 2012 12:29 pm A.T. Fish wrote: But the dummy plug is supposed to be used by itself, without a pilot, and it only synchronizes with the Eva upon activation.

[]:             Quote Post by A.T. Fish » Mon Dec 24, 2012 12:54 pm I should have made myself clearer before, I meant to say that the plug is supposed to be used alone, and even when it isn't the dummy system stays dormant until activation, so there should be no concern regarding the Reidundancy pointed out by Chuckman.
